fields.label: Search Query
fields.help: The search keyword used by the selected engine. Example: pizza.

fields.label: Country/Region
fields.help: Targets results by country or region. Example: us.

fields.label: Next page token
fields.help: This parameter defines Next page token for the SERP request. Parameter name: next_page_token.

fields.label: Section page token
fields.help: This parameter defines Section page token for the SERP request. Parameter name: section_page_token.

fields.label: See more token
fields.help: This parameter defines See more token for the SERP request. Parameter name: see_more_token.

fields.label: No Cache
fields.help: When enabled, the adapter returns a fresh preview result.
